---
title: "ONT_sim"
author: "Mona Taouk"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(cowplot)

data <- read.csv("results/all_tools_stats.tsv", sep = "\t")

data$Identity_Qscore <- -10 * log10(1 - data$actual_identity)
data$Identity_Qscore <- pmin(data$Identity_Qscore, 50)  # set infinities to 50

data <- data %>%
  mutate(tool = recode(
    tool,
    "simlord" = "SimLoRD",
    "real_reads" = "Real reads"
  ))

df_Badread <- data %>% filter(tool == "Badread")
df_LongISLND <- data %>% filter(tool == "LongISLND")
df_lrsim <- data %>% filter(tool == "lrsim")
df_NanoSim <- data %>% filter(tool == "NanoSim")
df_PBSIM3 <- data %>% filter(tool == "PBSIM3")
df_SimLoRD <- data %>% filter(tool == "SimLoRD")
df_Real_reads <- data %>% filter(tool == "Real reads")
```

```{r colours}
badread_colour <- "#B96762"
longislnd_colour <- "#8E7F00"
lrsim_colour <- "#269049"
nanosim_colour <- "#009295"
pbsim3_colour <- "#5F7DBE"
simlord_colour <- "#B460A8"
real_reads_colour <- "#7E7E7E"
reference_line_colour <- "grey70"

adjust_figure_4_colours <- function(colour, luminance_scale = 0.3, chroma_scale = 1.25) {
  hcl_values <- colorspace::coords(
    as(colorspace::hex2RGB(colour), "polarLUV")
  )

  hcl_values[, "L"] <- hcl_values[, "L"] * luminance_scale
  hcl_values[, "C"] <- hcl_values[, "C"] * chroma_scale

  adjusted <- colorspace::hex(
    colorspace::polarLUV(
      L = hcl_values[, "L"],
      C = hcl_values[, "C"],
      H = hcl_values[, "H"]
    ),
    fixup = TRUE
  )

  stats::setNames(adjusted, names(colour))
}

figure_4_colours <- adjust_figure_4_colours(c(
  "Badread" = badread_colour,
  "LongISLND" = longislnd_colour,
  "lrsim" = lrsim_colour,
  "NanoSim" = nanosim_colour,
  "PBSIM3" = pbsim3_colour,
  "SimLoRD" = simlord_colour,
  "Real reads" = real_reads_colour
))
```

```{r themes}
histogram_panel_theme <- theme_bw() + theme(
  axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
  plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, margin = margin(b = 2.0)),
  plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 0, 0),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
  panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
)

scatter_panel_theme <- theme_bw() + theme(
  axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
  plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, margin = margin(b = 2.0)),
  plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 0, 0),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white")
)
```

```{r plot_scales}
read_length_x_scale <- function() {
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = label_number(scale = 1 / 1000),
    limits = c(0, 80000)
  )
}

empirical_qscore_labels <- function(x) {
  parse(text = ifelse(x == 50, "displaystyle(infinity)", as.character(x)))
}

empirical_read_qscore_x_scale <- function() {
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 51),
    breaks =  c(seq(0, 40, 10), 50),
    labels = empirical_qscore_labels
  )
}

reported_read_qscore_x_scale <- function() {
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 51))
}

empirical_read_qscore_y_scale <- function() {
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 51),
    breaks =  c(seq(0, 40, 10), 50),
    labels = empirical_qscore_labels
  )
}

enlarge_infinity_tick <- function(plot, axis, fontsize = 12.0) {
  axis_name <- switch(axis, x = "axis-b", y = "axis-l")
  grob <- ggplotGrob(plot)
  axis_index <- which(grob$layout$name == axis_name)
  if (length(axis_index) == 0) { return(grob) }
  axis_grob <- grob$grobs[[axis_index]]
  text_grob <- axis_grob$children$axis$grobs[[2]]$children[[1]]
  label_count <- length(text_grob$label)
  if (label_count == 0) { return(grob) }
  text_grob$gp$fontsize <- rep(text_grob$gp$fontsize, label_count)
  text_grob$gp$fontsize[label_count] <- fontsize
  axis_grob$children$axis$grobs[[2]]$children[[1]] <- text_grob
  grob$grobs[[axis_index]] <- axis_grob
  grob
}

supplementary_qscore_x_scale <- function() {
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 80))
}

supplementary_empirical_base_qscore_y_scale <- function() {
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 60),
    breaks = c(seq(0, 50, 10), 60),
    labels = parse(text = c(as.character(seq(0, 50, 10)), "infinity"))
  )
}

count_y_scale <- function() {
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, NA),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  )
}

save_and_crop_figure <- function(filename, plot, height = 160, width = 200) {
  ggsave(
    filename, plot,
    height = height, width = width,
    units = "mm", device = "pdf"
  )

  # Trim whitespace from the edges (requires pdfcrop to be available on the CLI)
  pdfcrop <- Sys.which("pdfcrop")
  if (nzchar(pdfcrop)) {
    system2(pdfcrop, c(filename, filename))
  }
}
```

```{r figure_1}
plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, position = "identity", fill = real_reads_colour, colour = real_reads_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  read_length_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "Read length (kbp)", y = "Base count", title = "Real reads") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, position = "identity", fill = badread_colour, colour = badread_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  read_length_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, position = "identity", fill = longislnd_colour, colour = longislnd_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  read_length_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, position = "identity", fill = lrsim_colour, colour = lrsim_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  read_length_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "lrsim") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, position = "identity", fill = nanosim_colour, colour = nanosim_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  read_length_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, position = "identity", fill = pbsim3_colour, colour = pbsim3_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  read_length_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = read_length)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, position = "identity", fill = simlord_colour, colour = simlord_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  read_length_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "SimLoRD") +
  histogram_panel_theme

figure_1 <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = list(
    NULL, plot_Badread, plot_LongISLND,
    plot_real, plot_lrsim, plot_NanoSim,
    NULL, plot_PBSIM3, plot_SimLoRD
  ),
  ncol = 3, align = "h", axis = "b"
)

save_and_crop_figure("figures/figure_1.pdf", figure_1)

figure_1
```

```{r figure_2}
plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = real_reads_colour, colour = real_reads_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  empirical_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "Empirical read Q\u00adscore", y = "Read count", title = "Real reads") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = badread_colour, colour = badread_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  empirical_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = longislnd_colour, colour = longislnd_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  empirical_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = lrsim_colour, colour = lrsim_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  empirical_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "lrsim") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = nanosim_colour, colour = nanosim_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  empirical_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = pbsim3_colour, colour = pbsim3_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  empirical_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = Identity_Qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = simlord_colour, colour = simlord_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  empirical_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "SimLoRD") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_Badread <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_Badread, "x")
plot_LongISLND <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_LongISLND, "x")
plot_lrsim <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_lrsim, "x")
plot_NanoSim <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_NanoSim, "x")
plot_PBSIM3 <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_PBSIM3, "x")
plot_SimLoRD <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_SimLoRD, "x")
plot_real <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_real, "x")

figure_2 <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = list(
    NULL, plot_Badread, plot_LongISLND,
    plot_real, plot_lrsim, plot_NanoSim,
    NULL, plot_PBSIM3, plot_SimLoRD
  ),
  ncol = 3, align = "h", axis = "b"
)

save_and_crop_figure("figures/figure_2.pdf", figure_2)

figure_2
```

```{r figure_3}
plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = real_reads_colour, colour = real_reads_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "Reported read Q\u00adscore", y = "Read count", title = "Real reads") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = badread_colour, colour = badread_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = longislnd_colour, colour = longislnd_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = lrsim_colour, colour = lrsim_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "lrsim") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = nanosim_colour, colour = nanosim_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = pbsim3_colour, colour = pbsim3_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  histogram_panel_theme

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = mean_qscore)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, position = "identity", fill = simlord_colour, colour = simlord_colour, linewidth = 0.15) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  count_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "SimLoRD") +
  histogram_panel_theme

figure_3 <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = list(
    NULL, plot_Badread, plot_LongISLND,
    plot_real, plot_lrsim, plot_NanoSim,
    NULL, plot_PBSIM3, plot_SimLoRD
  ),
  ncol = 3, align = "h", axis = "b"
)

save_and_crop_figure("figures/figure_3.pdf", figure_3)

figure_3
```

```{r figure_4}
figure_4_point_layer <- function(colour) {
  ggrastr::geom_point_rast(
    alpha = 0.05,
    colour = colour,
    shape = 16,
    size = 0.1,
    raster.dpi = 600,
    dev = "ragg"
  )
}

plot_real <- ggplot(df_Real_reads, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  figure_4_point_layer(figure_4_colours[["Real reads"]]) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  empirical_read_qscore_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "Reported read Q\u00adscore", y = "Empirical read Q\u00adscore", title = "Real reads") +
  scatter_panel_theme

plot_Badread <- ggplot(df_Badread, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  figure_4_point_layer(figure_4_colours[["Badread"]]) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  empirical_read_qscore_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Badread") +
  scatter_panel_theme

plot_LongISLND <- ggplot(df_LongISLND, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  figure_4_point_layer(figure_4_colours[["LongISLND"]]) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  empirical_read_qscore_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "LongISLND") +
  scatter_panel_theme

plot_lrsim <- ggplot(df_lrsim, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  figure_4_point_layer(figure_4_colours[["lrsim"]]) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  empirical_read_qscore_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "lrsim") +
  scatter_panel_theme

plot_NanoSim <- ggplot(df_NanoSim, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  figure_4_point_layer(figure_4_colours[["NanoSim"]]) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  empirical_read_qscore_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "NanoSim") +
  scatter_panel_theme

plot_PBSIM3 <- ggplot(df_PBSIM3, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  figure_4_point_layer(figure_4_colours[["PBSIM3"]]) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  empirical_read_qscore_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "PBSIM3") +
  scatter_panel_theme

plot_SimLoRD <- ggplot(df_SimLoRD, aes(x = mean_qscore, y = Identity_Qscore)) +
  figure_4_point_layer(figure_4_colours[["SimLoRD"]]) +
  reported_read_qscore_x_scale() +
  empirical_read_qscore_y_scale() +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "SimLoRD") +
  scatter_panel_theme

plot_Badread <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_Badread, "y")
plot_LongISLND <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_LongISLND, "y")
plot_lrsim <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_lrsim, "y")
plot_NanoSim <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_NanoSim, "y")
plot_PBSIM3 <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_PBSIM3, "y")
plot_SimLoRD <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_SimLoRD, "y")
plot_real <- enlarge_infinity_tick(plot_real, "y")

figure_4 <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = list(
    NULL, plot_Badread, plot_LongISLND,
    plot_real, plot_lrsim, plot_NanoSim,
    NULL, plot_PBSIM3, plot_SimLoRD
  ),
  ncol = 3, align = "hv", axis = "tblr"
)

save_and_crop_figure("figures/figure_4.pdf", figure_4)

figure_4
```

```{r load_per_base_data}
files <- tribble(
  ~tool,        ~file,
  "Real reads", "results/real.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "Badread",    "results/Badread.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "LongISLND",  "results/LongISLND.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "lrsim",      "results/lrsim.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "NanoSim",    "results/NanoSim.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "PBSIM3",     "results/PBSIM3.qscore_counts.tsv",
  "SimLoRD",    "results/simlord.qscore_counts.tsv"
)

per_base <- files %>%
  mutate(data = map(file, ~ read_tsv(.x, show_col_types = FALSE))) %>%
  unnest(data) %>%
  mutate(
    all_errors   = mismatch + insertion + deletion,
    total        = all_errors + match,
    error_rate   = all_errors / total,
    error_qscore = -10 * log10(error_rate)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(total) & total > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    tool = factor(
      tool,
      levels = c("Real reads", setdiff(unique(tool), "Real reads"))
    )
  )

per_base$error_qscore <- pmin(per_base$error_qscore, 60)  # set infinities to 60

per_base_real <- per_base %>% filter(tool == "Real reads")
```

```{r figure_s1}
per_base_count_plot <- function(data, y_column, colour, title, x_label = "", y_label = "", plot_theme) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = qscore, y = .data[[y_column]])) +
    geom_col(fill = colour, colour = colour, width = 1, linewidth = 0.15) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label, title = title) +
    supplementary_qscore_x_scale() +
    count_y_scale() +
    plot_theme
}

p_real_correct <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base_real,
  y_column = "match",
  colour = real_reads_colour, title = "Real reads",
  x_label = "Reported base Q\u00adscore",
  y_label = "Base count",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_badread_correct <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "Badread"),
  y_column = "match",
  colour = badread_colour, title = "Badread",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_longislnd_correct <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "LongISLND"),
  y_column = "match",
  colour = longislnd_colour, title = "LongISLND",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_lrsim_correct <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "lrsim"),
  y_column = "match",
  colour = lrsim_colour, title = "lrsim",
  y_label = "",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_nanosim_correct <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "NanoSim"),
  y_column = "match",
  colour = nanosim_colour, title = "NanoSim",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_pbsim3_correct <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "PBSIM3"),
  y_column = "match",
  colour = pbsim3_colour, title = "PBSIM3",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_simlord_correct <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "SimLoRD"),
  y_column = "match",
  colour = simlord_colour, title = "SimLoRD",
  x_label = "",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

figure_s1 <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = list(
    NULL, p_badread_correct, p_longislnd_correct,
    p_real_correct, p_lrsim_correct, p_nanosim_correct,
    NULL, p_pbsim3_correct, p_simlord_correct
  ),
  ncol = 3, align = "h", axis = "b"
)

save_and_crop_figure("figures/figure_s1.pdf", figure_s1)

figure_s1
```

```{r figure_s2}
p_real_error <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base_real,
  y_column = "all_errors",
  colour = real_reads_colour, title = "Real reads",
  x_label = "Reported base Q\u00adscore",
  y_label = "Base count",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_badread_error <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "Badread"),
  y_column = "all_errors",
  colour = badread_colour, title = "Badread",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_longislnd_error <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "LongISLND"),
  y_column = "all_errors",
  colour = longislnd_colour, title = "LongISLND",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_lrsim_error <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "lrsim"),
  y_column = "all_errors",
  colour = lrsim_colour, title = "lrsim",
  y_label = "",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_nanosim_error <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "NanoSim"),
  y_column = "all_errors",
  colour = nanosim_colour, title = "NanoSim",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_pbsim3_error <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "PBSIM3"),
  y_column = "all_errors",
  colour = pbsim3_colour, title = "PBSIM3",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

p_simlord_error <- per_base_count_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "SimLoRD"),
  y_column = "all_errors",
  colour = simlord_colour, title = "SimLoRD",
  x_label = "",
  plot_theme = histogram_panel_theme
)

figure_s2 <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = list(
    NULL, p_badread_error, p_longislnd_error,
    p_real_error, p_lrsim_error, p_nanosim_error,
    NULL, p_pbsim3_error, p_simlord_error
  ),
  ncol = 3, align = "h", axis = "b"
)

save_and_crop_figure("figures/figure_s2.pdf", figure_s2)

figure_s2
```

```{r figure_s3}
per_base_calibration_plot <- function(data, colour, title, x_label = "", y_label = "", plot_theme) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = qscore, y = error_qscore)) +
    geom_segment(
      x = 0, y = 0, xend = 60, yend = 60,
      linetype = "dashed", colour = reference_line_colour
    ) +
    geom_point(colour = colour, alpha = 0.8, size = 1.5, shape = 16) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label, title = title) +
    supplementary_qscore_x_scale() +
    supplementary_empirical_base_qscore_y_scale() +
    plot_theme
}

p_real_cal <- per_base_calibration_plot(
  data = per_base_real,
  colour = real_reads_colour, title = "Real reads",
  x_label = "Reported base Q\u00adscore",
  y_label = "Empirical base Q\u00adscore",
  plot_theme = scatter_panel_theme
)

p_badread_cal <- per_base_calibration_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "Badread"),
  colour = badread_colour, title = "Badread",
  plot_theme = scatter_panel_theme
)

p_longislnd_cal <- per_base_calibration_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "LongISLND"),
  colour = longislnd_colour, title = "LongISLND",
  plot_theme = scatter_panel_theme
)

p_lrsim_cal <- per_base_calibration_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "lrsim"),
  colour = lrsim_colour, title = "lrsim",
  y_label = "",
  plot_theme = scatter_panel_theme
)

p_nanosim_cal <- per_base_calibration_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "NanoSim"),
  colour = nanosim_colour, title = "NanoSim",
  plot_theme = scatter_panel_theme
)

p_pbsim3_cal <- per_base_calibration_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "PBSIM3"),
  colour = pbsim3_colour, title = "PBSIM3",
  plot_theme = scatter_panel_theme
)

p_simlord_cal <- per_base_calibration_plot(
  data = per_base %>% filter(tool == "SimLoRD"),
  colour = simlord_colour, title = "SimLoRD",
  x_label = "",
  plot_theme = scatter_panel_theme
)

p_badread_cal <- enlarge_infinity_tick(p_badread_cal, "y")
p_longislnd_cal <- enlarge_infinity_tick(p_longislnd_cal, "y")
p_lrsim_cal <- enlarge_infinity_tick(p_lrsim_cal, "y")
p_nanosim_cal <- enlarge_infinity_tick(p_nanosim_cal, "y")
p_real_cal <- enlarge_infinity_tick(p_real_cal, "y")
p_pbsim3_cal <- enlarge_infinity_tick(p_pbsim3_cal, "y")
p_simlord_cal <- enlarge_infinity_tick(p_simlord_cal, "y")

figure_s3 <- plot_grid(
  plotlist = list(
    NULL, p_badread_cal, p_longislnd_cal,
    p_real_cal, p_lrsim_cal, p_nanosim_cal,
    NULL, p_pbsim3_cal, p_simlord_cal
  ),
  ncol = 3, align = "hv", axis = "tblr"
)

save_and_crop_figure("figures/figure_s3.pdf", figure_s3)

figure_s3
```
